bits.premise: A gay friend exploits competitive masculinity by issuing a sexual challenge after getting a straight man drunk, forcing him to participate to avoid losing.
The archetype of the wise, church-going old Black man has been replaced by one chasing women, collapsing generational wisdom into debauchery.

lines.text: - Sup, niggas?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You guys are easy.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Y'all ever try to be friends with a gay person?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I have 'cause I'm progressive.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but you gotta watch out for him.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause them niggas, they will try to fuck you.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like I went out with Buddy, and we went shot for shot.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We was having a great fucking time.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But he waited until I got good and drunk.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And he started trying to challenge me to like weird games.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He was like, "Yo, I bet you,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I could beat you in a dick sucking competition."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And that shit really blew me 'cause I'm like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: there's no way I'ma lose to a fuck.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like, wait, listen, I'm not gay, I'm just competitive.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Times are changing.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Times are changing.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We got old nigga YNs now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, I don't know if y'all ever thought about this,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but whatever happened to old black people?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They used to be in the church.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They used to give great advice.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: An old nigga at my job last week came up to me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He was like, "Where the hoes at?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Nigga, your kids are the hoes.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: What are you talking about?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: All right, yeah, this is my time.
lines.label: fluff
